validation_results.test_output_summary: 7 tests passed in 0.10s: test_named_constants, test_minimum_probe_set_satisfies_gate, test_below_minimum_probe_set_fails_gate, test_divergent_result_clears_full_parity, test_matching_results_achieves_full_parity, test_parity_report_structure, test_harness_consumes_search_results

Named constants validated in dedicated test

criteria_verification.notes: Independent tests test_parity_report_structure and test_matching_results_achieves_full_parity passed. Evidence shows run_probe_harness() iterates all queries, executes search+assembly, compares to baselines, returns ParityReport with all required fields.
Independent test test_minimum_probe_set_satisfies_gate passed. Creates 15-probe set, verifies total_probes==15 and meets_minimum_size==True. Boundary condition (just-inside) correctly handled.
Independent test test_below_minimum_probe_set_fails_gate passed. Creates 14-probe set, verifies total_probes==14 and meets_minimum_size==False. Boundary condition (just-outside) correctly handled.

Independent test test_divergent_result_clears_full_parity passed. Mock returns different answer, harness detects divergence, increments divergences_count, appends to divergent_queries, and sets full_parity=False.

Independent test test_named_constants passed. Module-level PARITY_TOLERANCE=0 defined, full_parity calculation uses it (divergences_count <= PARITY_TOLERANCE). One-line change confirmed for future tolerance adjustment.
Independent test test_named_constants passed. Module-level MIN_PROBE_SET_SIZE=15 defined, meets_minimum_size check uses it. No magic literals in comparison logic.

Evidence shows 'ruff check' returned 'All checks passed!' for both probe_harness.py and test_probe_harness.py. Import issues fixed (Awaitable/Callable moved to collections.abc, unused import removed).

rationale: All seven acceptance criteria verified by deterministic evidence from independent test execution. Quality gates passed (tests=true, coverage=true, plan_audit=true). Honesty verification clean (score 1.0, zero discrepancies). Independent tests signal present (7 passed, signal_absent=false). Boundary conditions tested (15=pass, 14=fail). Named constants validated. Lint checks passed. Advisory issues (missing Phase-3 agent, wiring parse degradation) are non-blocking and superseded by passing independent tests.
